description: Add SysEx address constants for the 6 Comp+EQ units (offset 00 08 00 in SN-D/PCMD tone blocks), the Studio Set Comp+EQ common params (switch, part assign, output assigns at 00 43-4A), and CompEqUnit/CompEqState structs to state.rs. Each unit has: comp switch/attack/release/threshold/ratio/gain + EQ switch/low freq/gain/mid freq/gain/q/high freq/gain (14 bytes per unit, 6 units = 84 bytes total).
title: Add Comp+EQ address constants and state types to core
